data.body: STATUS (handoff): IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED as stack commit 23581b171 (current stack TIP). Plan-review PASS+signed (round 3). Pre-commit lint+mypy PASSED; tests/unit/test_threshold_recalibration.py (7) + routing parity green. NOT CLOSED: awaiting Gerrit Verified. NOTE: this commit made G1G2/T1/T8 blocking@0.70 in the worktree, so it slightly tightens plan-reviews run in this worktree afterward.
